title: Architectural and Civil Drafters
description: Prepare detailed drawings of architectural and structural features of buildings or drawings and topographical relief maps used in civil engineering projects, such as highways, bridges, and public works. Use knowledge of building materials, engineering practices, and mathematics to complete drawings.

tasks.text: Produce drawings, using computer-assisted drafting systems (CAD) or drafting machines, or by hand, using compasses, dividers, protractors, triangles, and other drafting devices.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Draft plans and detailed drawings for structures, installations, and construction projects, such as highways, sewage disposal systems, and dikes, working from sketches or notes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Coordinate structural, electrical, and mechanical designs and determine a method of presentation to graphically represent building plans.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Analyze building codes, by-laws, space and site requirements, and other technical documents and reports to determine their effect on architectural designs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Draw maps, diagrams, and profiles, using cross-sections and surveys, to represent elevations, topographical contours, subsurface formations, and structures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Lay out and plan interior room arrangements for commercial buildings, using computer-assisted drafting (CAD) equipment and software.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Supervise and train other technologists, technicians, and drafters.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Determine the order of work and method of presentation, such as orthographic or isometric drawing.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Finish and duplicate drawings and documentation packages according to required mediums and specifications for reproduction, using blueprinting, photography, or other duplicating methods.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Draw rough and detailed scale plans for foundations, buildings, and structures, based on preliminary concepts, sketches, engineering calculations, specification sheets, and other data.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Correlate, interpret, and modify data obtained from topographical surveys, well logs, and geophysical prospecting reports.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Check dimensions of materials to be used and assign numbers to lists of materials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Determine procedures and instructions to be followed, according to design specifications and quantity of required materials.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Supervise or conduct field surveys, inspections, or technical investigations to obtain data required to revise construction drawings.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Explain drawings to production or construction teams and provide adjustments as necessary.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Obtain and assemble data to complete architectural designs, visiting job sites to compile measurements as necessary.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Determine quality, cost, strength, and quantity of required materials, and enter figures on materials lists.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Locate and identify symbols on topographical surveys to denote geological and geophysical formations or oil field installations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Create freehand drawings and lettering to accompany drawings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Calculate excavation tonnage and prepare graphs and fill-hauling diagrams for use in earth-moving operations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare colored drawings of landscape and interior designs for presentation to client.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Calculate weights, volumes, and stress factors and their implications for technical aspects of designs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plot characteristics of boreholes for oil and gas wells from photographic subsurface survey recordings and other data, representing depth, degree, and direction of inclination.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Reproduce drawings on copy machines or trace copies of plans and drawings, using transparent paper or cloth, ink, pencil, and standard drafting instruments.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Calculate heat loss and gain of buildings and structures to determine required equipment specifications, following standard procedures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare cost estimates, contracts, bidding documents, and technical reports for specific projects under an architect's or engineer's supervision.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Represent architect or engineer on construction site, ensuring builder compliance with design specifications and advising on design corrections, under supervision.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review rough sketches, drawings, specifications, and other engineering data to ensure that they conform to design concepts.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
